stem: A buyer is comparing two CPUs to decide which one will give their desktop computer better performance.
review_notes: 2024 J277/01 Q6(c) style. Pupils must pick the three CPU characteristics that affect performance. Distractors are common misconceptions (RAM capacity, graphics card, hard-drive size).

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Tick the three characteristics of a CPU that affect its performance.

misconceptions.label: RAM / storage confused with CPU spec
misconceptions.description: RAM capacity and hard-drive size affect overall system performance but are not characteristics of the CPU itself.
